headline: Max keeps the crown as Alex and Henry feel the pinch
text: Brazil (Max) edged Japan (Alex) 2-1, so Max stays top and Alex takes the hit. Canada (Henry) then won 1-0 against South Africa (Rosaria), giving Henry a handy boost and leaving Rosaria with a frustrating week. The only draw was Algeria (Rosaria) 3-3 Austria (Grandad), which kept Grandad steady but did Rosaria no favours. Overall, Max is still best with 22 points, while Sofia remains bottom on 8. Henry and Rosaria are bunched on 17, but Henry’s goal difference is the shakiest of the lot.
